# ReferBenefits

[ReferBenefits](https://referbenefits.co.in/) is India's most trusted platform for discovering verified sign-up bonuses, referral codes, and invite links.

## Categories
- [Fintech Offers](https://referbenefits.co.in/category/fintech/) (CRED, Swiggy, Groww, NiYO)
- [Food & Delivery Offers](https://referbenefits.co.in/category/food/) (Zomato, Swiggy)
- [Shopping Offers](https://referbenefits.co.in/category/shopping/) (AJIO, BuyHatke)
- [Investing & Wealth Offers](https://referbenefits.co.in/category/investing/) (Groww)

## Access Information
All referral detail pages are served statically. Affiliate redirect URLs are located under `/go/[slug]/`.
